content.en:
Special Spaces.

Ye Tian entered here and saw a cyan lake.

However, there are no living creatures here other than him.

"This should be the nest of the invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm!"

He entered this lake, and immediately felt a majestic energy rush into his body, helping him refine the body of this insect replicating body, so that the body continued to improve.

"It's such a powerful effect, no wonder that insect is so powerful, this treasure land is the reason for his strength to increase. "

Ye Tian didn't use this insect to copy his body to cultivate, he directly copied his true body and copied it.

Subsequently.

His true body is a replica of his body and cultivates here.

Ye Tian's true body copy body is so powerful, but in this cyan lake, his physical fitness is also improving rapidly.

And.

His other origin can also be improved through this cyan lake, and the effect is also quite good.

"This lake is the biggest bonus this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, he cultivated here, and the origin of the other side slowly improved, and his physical fitness was also improved, as if there was no end.

Before you know it, 100,000 primeval years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's physical body had reached a certain limit, that is, a bottleneck, and it was difficult to continue to improve.

And this lake still has a lot of energy, but unfortunately he can't absorb it anymore, unless he can break the limit.

However, his other side origin can still be slowly improved.

He has tested it, and his other origin has reached the level of 1.8 million, which is not a small progress.

And because of this blue lake, he didn't use the insect gold on the other side.

These insect gold on the other side are not as good as this cyan lake, so it is better to keep them for their son Ye Xingchen or the human race in the future.

......

this day.

The Lord of Ice and Rain informed Ye Tian of something.

"Lord of Endless, the Xuanyin Pavilion in the middle has held a trade fair, you can go and check it out. According to my intelligence, this trade fair is grand. You have a lot of ruin god gold, and you can exchange it for a lot of wealth, so that you can buy a treasure that is no less than the Origin Gold Leaf on the other side. The Lord of Ice and Rain said.

"How much longer?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Thirty primeval epochs later!"

The Lord of the Ice and Rain.

Thirty primeval epochs is not a long time, but he also has a lot of treasures such as ruin god gold on his body, as well as the lake obtained by the True Insect Realm, he has also scraped them all, and he can also sell some of them when the time comes.

With his amazing wealth, there are definitely a lot of good things that can be traded.

When the time comes, he can completely trade a treasure similar to the Origin Gold Leaf of the Other Shore, so as to make his Origin Rules of the Other Shore improve rapidly.

In that case, he wouldn't be far away from impacting the Origin Realm.

Meanwhile.

The Lord of the White Capital, the Lord of the True Lin, and the Lord of the Ancient Lin of Fengya Island have also been notified, and they are all ready to go to the Xuanyin Pavilion Trade Fair to have a look.

As for the slightly weaker Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, he was not notified, and even in the past, he didn't have enough capital to trade good things!

Moreover, each faction has a limited number of invitations.

......

In a flash, thirty primeval epochs have passed.

In these thirty primeval eras, Ye Tian was also doing his best to collect resources and prepare for the later trade fairs.

this day.

The Lord of Wind Tooth and the Lord of Ice Rain took Ye Tian and them out of Wind Tooth Island and headed to the Xuanyin Giant City in the middle, where the trade fair was held.

Ye Tian had never gone deep into the central part of the country, although he had been to the central part before, he had stopped at the territory of the Xiao family on the edge of the central part.

Nowadays, it can be regarded as truly entering the middle.

Soon.

They came to the giant city of Xuanyin in the middle of the land of eternity.

As soon as he entered here, Ye Tian sensed a lot of Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and they were all top-notch ones, and there were even quite a few Origin Upper Realms.

In the Origin Black River, the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor is very rare.

But in the central region, it is not uncommon, there are too many forces in the central region, and many forces have Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Even the Xiao family on the edge of the middle has a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, which shows how many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors there are in the middle of the middle.

......

The trading currency of this trade fair is the other side of the source stone.

The source stone of the other side is still very valuable in the east of the land of eternity, even a source stone of the other side is very precious.

But here, the source stone on the other side is very ordinary, and an ordinary source stone is equivalent to a dollar for ordinary people.

Ye Tian didn't have many source stones on the other side, and he was ready to exchange for some more source stones on the other side.

Like the Xuanyin Pavilion and many other forces, they have built branches here, and they can sell some items in exchange for the source stones on the other side, so that it is convenient to trade.

Ye Tian came to Xuanyin Pavilion and took out a lot of precious items, exchanging them one by one, in exchange for a large number of source stones from the other side.

Of course.

In this trade fair, there must also be Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor who will exchange things for things, so he didn't exchange all the treasures on his body for the source stones on the other side.

The fair is dominated by shops and various small auctions, and there are auction places everywhere.

At this time.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth and the Lord of Ice and Rain were separated from Ye Tian.

It is not yet the time for the official start of the trade fair, many big forces have not arrived, and the transactions here are also petty.

But even if it's a small fight, it doesn't mean that there are no good things to trade.

Ye Tian walked around and really found a good thing to trade.

Somewhere in the giant city of Xuanyin.

In an attic, an Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor took out a cyan fruit.

This fruit looked very ordinary, but the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors who recognized it exclaimed in amazement.

"Nine Realms True Source Fruit!"

Ye Tian didn't know the Nine Realms True Source Fruit, this was obviously a resource that only belonged to the Central Realm.

From the discussions of other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, he also knew the value and usefulness of this resource.

The Nine Realms True Origin Fruit can refine the will of the Origin Realm, and for the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Middle Realm, the Origin or the Origin Will is strong, which can increase the success rate of impacting the Origin Upper Realm.

Like Ye Tian, the other side of the origin is already very strong, reaching 1.8 million.

However, his Origin Will is not strong, and he has not even reached 1 million at present.

The Nine Realms True Source Fruit could definitely easily increase his Origin Realm will to more than 1 million, and even had the effect of assisting in impacting the Origin Upper Realm.

"The Nine Realms True Source Fruit is useful to me!"

He's going to buy it.

He was not the only one who could target the Nine Realms True Source Fruit, there were other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

At this moment, this Origin Upper Realm holding the Nine Realms True Source Fruit let many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors bid, and the one with the highest price won.
